rule: For ***WD*** about invariant, where the invariant contains `card(...)`, you ***must use `strengthenInvariant`*** to update the invariant.

e.g. for partial function `f \\in A \\rightharpoonup B`, important!: ***replace*** `card({p \\mid p \\in A \\land f(p) = x}) \\leq 1` with `\\forall p,q \\cdot p \\in dom(f) \\land q \\in dom(f) \\land f(p)=x \\land f(q)=x \\implies p=q`. Keep the label same as before. Note that ***`dom(f)`*** is used instead of `A`.

After this, you must also ensure that the range of `f` contain distinct elements so that `p` and `q` can be compared. This should be done by `addHypothesesToContext`. The axiom should be `partition(B, {b_1}, {b_2}, ... {b_n})`, where `b_i` are all possible values in  `B`.
Return these two functions at once.
